title: axi-factorio corrected user viewer

requestBullets: Replace the earlier command-center reference with the newly supplied compact pipeline-matrix reference.
Show projects as grouped sections with every task named at the left and one continuous bead track across the pipeline.
Derive step columns and their grouped top bands from the actual checked-in pipeline definitions rather than inventing DEV, BETA, or PROD stages.
Keep the shipped user viewer calm and operational, separate from the internal scenario-debugging workbench.

currentAppAnchor.verdict: Anchored to the supplied corrected screenshot and the existing shipped ViewerServer data model.
stateInventory: fixture with three projects and three tasks
empty project using its default checked-in pipeline

viewStates.label: Three projects share G1, G2, and G3 columns; tasks render as bead tracks.
A project with no tasks still exposes the checked-in default pipeline columns.
The shipped surface contains overview controls and no internal test harness diagnostics.

screenshots.title: Supplied corrected visual reference
screenshots.sourceIdentity: local attachment anchored to local diff dd8a9488ff22ddcf5e6d6148670b531a13fdb452

knownLimits: The fixture has three pipeline steps rather than the thirteen illustrative columns in the reference. This is intentional: the viewer renders the current checked-in definitions. The supplied iconography was not approximated; nonessential icons are omitted until a real matching asset library is shipped.
